name: AI_AGENT_TRANSFER
subject: Msaada wa Haraka Unaohitajika: {{customerName}}
body:
Habari {{businessName}},

Huu ni ujumbe wa kiotomatiki kutoka Orbi Shop AI Support. Mteja ameomba kuunganishwa na mhudumu wa kibinadamu katika duka lako.

Ujumbe wa mteja: "{{messageSnippet}}"

Tafadhali ingia kwenye akaunti yako ya Orbi Shop haraka iwezekanavyo ili kumhudumia mteja wako kwa weledi na kwa wakati.

Kwa heshima,
Timu ya Msaada ya Orbi Shop

name: AI_AGENT_TRANSFER
body: Orbi Shop: Habari {{businessName}}, mteja ameomba msaada wa haraka kutoka kwa mhudumu wa kibinadamu. Ingia kwenye akaunti yako sasa ili kumhudumia.

name: AI_AGENT_TRANSFER
subject: Immediate Support Requested: {{customerName}}
body:
Hello {{businessName}},

This is an automated notification from Orbi Shop AI Support. A customer has requested to speak with a human representative at your store.

Customer message: "{{messageSnippet}}"

Please sign in to your Orbi Shop account as soon as possible to assist your valued customer professionally and on time.

Kind regards,
Orbi Shop Support Team

name: AI_AGENT_TRANSFER
body: Orbi Shop: Hello {{businessName}}, a customer has requested immediate human support. Sign in to your account now to assist them.

name: NEW_SUPPORT_TICKET
subject: Tiketi Mpya ya Msaada: {{customerName}}
body:
Habari {{businessName}},

Huu ni ujumbe wa kiotomatiki kutoka Orbi Shop AI Support. Tiketi mpya ya msaada imewasilishwa na mteja wako.

Ujumbe wa mteja: "{{messageSnippet}}"

Tafadhali ingia kwenye akaunti yako ya Orbi Shop ili kuikagua tiketi hii na kutoa msaada wa kibinadamu kwa mteja wako kwa wakati.

Kwa heshima,
Timu ya Msaada ya Orbi Shop

name: NEW_SUPPORT_TICKET
body: Orbi Shop: Habari {{businessName}}, tiketi mpya ya msaada imefunguliwa na mteja wako. Ingia kwenye akaunti yako sasa ili kushughulikia.

name: NEW_SUPPORT_TICKET
subject: New Support Ticket: {{customerName}}
body:
Hello {{businessName}},

This is an automated notification from Orbi Shop AI Support. A new support ticket has been submitted by your customer.

Customer message: "{{messageSnippet}}"

Please sign in to your Orbi Shop account to review the ticket and provide timely human support to your valued customer.

Kind regards,
Orbi Shop Support Team

name: NEW_SUPPORT_TICKET
body: Orbi Shop: Hello {{businessName}}, a new customer support ticket has been opened. Sign in now to review and respond.

name: SHOP_SELLER_NEW_ORDER
subject: Oda Mpya Imepokelewa: {{orderId}}
body:
Habari {{sellerName}},

Umepokea oda mpya {{orderId}} kutoka kwa {{customerName}} kupitia ORBI Shop.

Kiasi cha oda: {{currency}} {{amount}}
Rejea: {{refId}}

Tafadhali ingia kwenye ORBI Shop ili kuthibitisha bidhaa, kuandaa oda, na kukamilisha hatua za usafirishaji kwa wakati.

Kwa heshima,
Timu ya ORBI Shop

name: SHOP_CAMPAIGN_PROMO_SELLERS
subject: Ongeza Mauzo ya Duka Lako kwa ORBI Shop
body:
Habari {{recipientName}},

ORBI Shop imekuandalia mwongozo maalum wa kukusaidia kuongeza mauzo, kuboresha uwasilishaji wa bidhaa zako, na kujenga uaminifu zaidi kwa wanunuzi.

Fungua mwongozo hapa: {{actionLink}}

Tumia fursa hii kuboresha duka lako na kuwafikia wateja wengi zaidi kwa usalama na uaminifu.

name: SHOP_DISPUTE_OPENED
subject: Dispute Opened for Order {{orderId}}
body:
Hello {{customerName}},

A dispute has been opened for order {{orderId}}. The ORBI Shop team will review all submitted details and keep you informed about the next steps.

For your security, please do not make any payments outside ORBI Shop while this matter is under review.

Ref: {{refId}}

Kind regards,
ORBI Shop Support Team

name: SHOP_CAMPAIGN_PROMO_SELLERS
subject: Grow Your Store with ORBI Shop
body:
Hello {{recipientName}},

ORBI Shop has prepared a dedicated seller guide to help you increase sales, improve your product listings, and build stronger buyer trust.

Open the guide here: {{actionLink}}

Use this opportunity to strengthen your store and reach more customers through a safer and more trusted marketplace experience.

subject: Kesi Imefunguliwa kwa Oda {{orderId}}

Habari {{customerName}},

Kesi imefunguliwa kwa oda {{orderId}}. Timu ya ORBI Shop itapitia taarifa zote zilizowasilishwa na kukujulisha hatua zinazofuata.

Kwa usalama wako, tafadhali usifanye malipo yoyote nje ya mfumo wa ORBI Shop wakati suala hili linaendelea kushughulikiwa.

Rejea: {{refId}}

Kwa heshima,
Timu ya Msaada ya ORBI Shop
